title: kaempferia parviflora
intro: Kaempferia parviflora, also known as 'Thai Black Ginger' or 'Krachai Dam' in Thai, is a type of plant that belongs to the ginger family and is native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Kaempferia parviflora are attributed to its active compounds, including kaempferol and parviflorin, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming Kaempferia parviflora include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Thai medicine. Kaempferia parviflora is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in cooking and as a flavoring agent in various dishes.
